feedback.text: I am concerned about the video games industry. I want to ask politely if you could include regulations for my beloved video games. There is a EU initiative (stopkillinggames) that has over 1 Million signatures. We want an end of life plan for video games. At the moment right now there are countless examples what happens if there is none. E.g. The Crew from Ubisoft. After Ubisoft shut down the server for that game, the game could not be played anymore. We customers paied money to play this game, but now it is not more possible. to me this is horrible. I hope you take our concern into consideration. Greetings from Germany.
